To Whom It May Concern:
Enclosed please find the Proposed Order Granting Plaintiff and Cross-
Defendant’s Demurrer to First Amended Cross Complaint. Defendant and Cross-
Plaintiff has reviewed the Proposed Order and responded that they have no
objection to it.
Please file it.
Additionally, I have enclosed another copy of the Proposed Order Granting
Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant’s Demurrer to First Amended Complaint. Please
file stamp and return it to me in the enclosed stamped self-addressed envelope.
Thank you for your cooperation in this matter.
